senators.name: John Hoeven
senators.notNerdReason: B.A. in economics and history from Dartmouth, MBA from Northwestern. Extensive banking career including CEO of Bank of North Dakota. Strong financial and economic expertise but no STEM or scientific background. Policy focus on agriculture and energy is pragmatic but not notably data-driven.
education: B.A. Economics and History, Dartmouth College
experience: President and CEO, Bank of North Dakota, 1993-2000
Executive VP, First Western Bank & Trust

senators.name: Kevin Cramer
senators.notNerdReason: B.A. from Concordia College and M.A. in management from University of Mary. Career in state government, party politics, and utility regulation. Served on North Dakota Public Service Commission but background is administrative rather than technical. No STEM education or notable evidence-based policy advocacy.
experience: State Economic Development Director under Gov. Schafer

ND-01.name: Julie Fedorchak
ND-01.notNerdReason: B.A. in journalism from University of North Dakota. No STEM degree. However, served 12 years on the North Dakota Public Service Commission regulating utilities and energy, and served as president of NARUC. Deep energy regulatory expertise demonstrates data-engagement but core background is communications, not technical.
education: B.A. Journalism, University of North Dakota
experience: President, National Association of Regulatory Utility Commissioners
State Director for U.S. Senator John Hoeven
Communications Director for Gov. Ed Schafer
